title: thyrsanthus laurifolius
intro: Thyrsanthus laurifolius, also known as the 'False Heliotrope', is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Thyrsanthus laurifolius include its ability to alleviate congestion, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and can also be found in some traditional remedies in the form of essential oils and extracts.
